## TokenRefreshPlugin.resume() method

Resume automatic token refresh after a . Immediately re-schedules the next refresh based on the current token expiry. If the token has already expired (or is about to), the refresh fires within one second.

**Signature:**

```typescript
resume(): void;
```
**Returns:**

void
